fixtures.description: Left text sample with a stable middle line and trailing newline.
Right text sample with one modified line and one added line.
Left CSV sample with stable product keys and numeric values.
Right CSV sample with changed price and one added product.
Two-pixel PNG sample for image decoding and pixel comparison.
Deterministic binary payload for hex and byte range tests.
Left folder tree with shared, changed, and left-only files.
Right folder tree with shared, changed, and right-only files.
